turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, mujhe puchhna tha ki aapke yahan GST lagta hai consultations pe?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji, medical consultations pe generally GST applicable nahi hota hai. Lekin kuch diagnostic tests aur non-medical services pe GST lag sakta hai. Aapke specific case ke baare mein billing counter pe confirm kar sakte hain.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Matlab doctor ki fees pe nahi lagega?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul sahi. Doctor consultation fees GST-exempt hoti hain India mein healthcare regulations ke anusaar.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Aur agar mujhe GST invoice chahiye kisi aur cheez ke liye?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, humara billing department GST-compliant invoices deta hai jahan applicable ho. Bas billing counter pe request karna hoga visit ke time.
